2026-04-16ISEDTelecommunications ActOrder declining to vary, rescind or refer back to the Canadian Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission for reconsideration Order declining to vary, rescind or refer back to the Canadian Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission (CRTC) for reconsideration Telcom Decision CRTC 2025-154, thereby letting it stand.N/A
subject: Order declining to vary, rescind or refer back to the Canadian Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission for reconsideration
precis: Order declining to vary, rescind or refer back to the Canadian Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission (CRTC) for reconsideration Telcom Decision CRTC 2025-154, thereby letting it stand.
